THIS JUDGMENT IS A JUDGMENT UPON STIPULATION AS TO DEFTS. MAURICE CHIN AND JACQUELINE CHIN AND A JUDGMENT AGAINST JOEL PAREDES AND BESSIE PAREDES BY DEFAULT FOR $3,282.85 PRINCIPAL INTEREST OF $ 273.60 COST OF $130.00 AND A TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $3,686.45 AS TO DEFAULTED DEFENDANTS JOEL PAREDES AND BESSIE PAREDES. JUDGMENT AGAINST JOEL AND BESSIE PAREDED SHALL NOT BE EXECUTED AND OR INTEREST ADD ED TO IT AS LONG AS DEFENDANTS MAURICE CHEN AND JACQUELINE MAKE TIMELY PAYMENTS AS SET FORTH ABOVE. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR SPECIFIC DETAILS AS TO ALL PARTIES.
